_comment.arc_bound: Workflow edges advance in topological order, so a non-empty level-zero graph must render at least one arc and at most one aggregate arc for each unordered pair of visible entities. Exact intra-wave edges do not exist. Only the overflow entity can legally contribute a self-arc, hence C(entities,2)+1.
_comment.calibration: Every committed pin, including the B5a per-step ceilings, was calibrated on the named host on 2026-07-15; normal mode refuses any null required pin. To recalibrate: run --calibrate on the named host, review the proposed pins in the evidence, copy them all together, and apply the documented 25ms B5a floor.
_comment.step_absolute_ceiling: Each B5a absolute step ceiling is max(ceil(the measured step latency (single sample per step) in milliseconds * 1.25 shared calibration headroom), 25ms). The frozen B5 expansion-ratio assertions remain in force alongside B5a.
_comment.step_ceiling_floor: B5a step ceilings use one measured latency sample per step and are pinned at max(ceil(sample x 1.25), 25ms): the 25ms floor absorbs single-digit-ms timer noise on cheap steps while remaining ~2 orders of magnitude tighter than the ratio bound B5 alone.
